Fuchs Elephant Charge 2018

29 September 2018 · 📍 Chisuka River

31 Entries
15 Completed
48% Finish rate
$133,318 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Green Mambas — For spending their charge helping other teams

Most Shafted

For smashing their winch and ending their day 100m from the first checkpoint
